home_heroDesc: Village to Global is dedicated to supporting communities through sustainable development, access to essential resources, and empowerment programs.
home_howDesc: Four easy steps to start making a real difference in communities around the world.
home_step1_desc: Browse active campaigns and select the cause that resonates with you.
home_step2_desc: Securely donate any amount — every contribution creates real impact.
home_step3_desc: See exactly how your donation is used via our transparency dashboard.
home_step4_desc: Volunteer, fundraise, and grow alongside thousands of changemakers.
home_missionDesc1: Village to Global is dedicated to supporting organizations and local initiatives that uplift communities. We focus on empowering people through sustainable development, access to essential resources, and community-driven programs that create lasting positive change.

home_ctaDesc: Join us in transforming lives. Whether through donations, volunteering, or partnerships, your support helps build stronger communities and a better world.
about_heroDesc: Founded in 2026, Togetherwise bridges the gap between global resources and local needs, creating lasting change in communities across the world.
about_missionTitle: Empowering Communities From Village to Global
about_missionDesc1: Village to Global is dedicated to supporting organizations and local initiatives that uplift communities. We focus on empowering people through sustainable development, access to essential resources, and community-driven programs that create lasting positive change.
about_missionDesc2_1: Since our founding, we've impacted over

about_val1_desc: We work across 15+ countries, connecting communities worldwide.
about_val2_desc: Every decision centers on the people we serve, not institutional interests.
about_val3_desc: 100% financial accountability — you always know where your money goes.
about_val4_desc: We build lasting relationships with local leaders and organizations.
